name: Set Up Institutional User Accounts
description: Create three active user accounts in the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, login: super-admin / admin) for a computer science department. Set the password for all accounts to 'SecurePass2024!' and the timezone to 'UTC'. The required accounts are: 'prof.martinez' (Elena Martinez, elena.martinez@university.edu, role: Exam Administrator), 'ta.chen' (Wei Chen, wei.chen@university.edu, role: Exam Supporter), and 'admin.thompson' (James Thompson, james.thompson@university.edu, role: Institutional Administrator).
